name: Xquik
description: Read-only X data workflows for tweet search, tweet lookup, user search, user lookup, trends, and radar research via the public Xquik REST API.
author: Crow

env_vars.name: XQUIK_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Xquik API key used by the configured REST client.

notes: Skill-only add-on. Configure a REST client with XQUIK_API_KEY before using the workflows.
